chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 124 –Arrival of Abu Muhammad Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/163)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/163)

parts.text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْقَاسِمِ أَبُو الْعَيْنَاءِ الْهَاشِمِيُّ مَوْلَى عَبْدِ الصَّمَدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ عَتَاقَةً

text: كُنْتُ أَدْخُلُ عَلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَأَعْطَشُ وَ أَنَا عِنْدَهُ فَأُجِلُّهُ أَنْ أَدْعُوَ بِالْمَاءِ فَيَقُولُ يَا غُلَامُ اسْقِهِ وَ رُبَّمَا حَدَّثْتُ نَفْسِي بِالنُّهُوضِ فَأُفَكِّرُ فِي ذَلِكَ فَيَقُولُ يَا غُلَامُ دَابَّتَهُ .

en.hubeali: Is’haq said, ‘Muhammad Bin Al Qasim Abu Al Ayana Al Hashimy, a slave of Abul Samad Bin Ali Ataqa narrated to me saying,

‘I used to go over to Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>). So I would get thirsty while I was in his<sup>asws</sup> presence, and I would defer calling for the water, and he<sup>asws</sup> would be saying: ‘O boy! Quench him’. And sometimes I would discuss with myself for the leaving and be thinking with regards to that, so he<sup>asws</sup> would be saying: ‘O boy! (Get) His animal’.
en.sarwar: 21. Ishaq has narrated from abu Hashim al-Ja‘fari who has said the following. “One day I went to see abu Muhammad (a.s.) and I wanted him to give me a certain amount of silver so I can make a ring out of it and keep for blessing. I sat down but forgot to ask what I had come for. When was leaving and said farewell to him he threw a ring to me and said, “You wanted silver and we gave you and profited the gems and the cost of the goldsmith works. May Allah grant you blessings O abu Hashim.” I then said, “I testify that you are the Wali of Allah, (one who possesses Divine Authority) and my Imam through my obedience whom I follow the religion of Allah.” He then said, “May Allah grant you forgiveness, O abu Hashim.”
